description: Does not suggest caching, CDN, lazy loading, or code splitting before completing questioning
Phase 1 establishes what 'fast enough' means with a concrete target or user baseline
Phase 2 probes where the 5 seconds is actually spent rather than assuming a cause
Phase 3 explores whether data volume or query design is the root cause
Synthesis identifies the root cause category (data/query problem, not frontend) before recommending a solution class
